title: Postel Compliance Key Fixture
description: Canonical schema for @postel/compliance test-key fixtures at compliance/vectors/_keys/*.yaml. Per the compliance capability spec's `Vector file schema` requirement: real ports SHALL NEVER reference these fixtures in production code paths — they are test-only material with documented 'for-test-only' provenance.

id.description: Logical identifier for this key fixture (e.g., 'hmac_primary', 'ed25519_a'). Stable across versions; vector files reference fixtures by filename, not by id.

algorithm.description: Signing algorithm. 'hmac-sha256' for symmetric (Standard Webhooks v1, whsec_ prefix). 'ed25519' for asymmetric (Standard Webhooks v1a, whsk_/whpk_ prefix).

key_material.description: Key material in Standard Webhooks prefix form. For hmac-sha256: whsec_<base64>. For ed25519: whsk_<base64-of-seed-or-private-key>. The for-test-only marker is enforced by living under compliance/vectors/_keys/ and the description field.

public_key.description: Public key for asymmetric fixtures (ed25519). whpk_<base64>. Forbidden for hmac-sha256 fixtures.

description.description: Free-form description that MUST identify this material as 'for-test-only' and SHOULD note the rationale (e.g., 'deterministic HMAC secret for HMAC v1 vectors — never use in production').
